title: ChatGPT Response
description: Schema for an OpenAI Responses API response object. Represents a model-generated response including output items, tool call results, token usage, and metadata. The Responses API is OpenAI's recommended API primitive for building with their models.

id.description: Unique identifier for the response, prefixed with 'resp_'

object.description: The object type, which is always 'response'

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the response was created

model.description: The model used to generate the response

status.description: The status of the response generation

output.description: An array of content items generated by the model, including messages, function calls, tool invocations, and reasoning items

usage.description: Token usage statistics for the response

error.description: An error object if the response generation failed

incomplete_details.description: Details about why the response is incomplete

reason.description: The reason the response is incomplete

instructions.description: The system or developer instructions provided for the response

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs attached to the response for storing additional information

temperature.description: The sampling temperature used for generation

top_p.description: The nucleus sampling parameter used for generation

max_output_tokens.description: The maximum number of output tokens configured for the response

previous_response_id.description: The ID of the previous response in a multi-turn conversation

reasoning.description: The reasoning configuration used for o-series models

text.description: The text format configuration used for the response

tools.description: The tools available during response generation

truncation.description: The truncation strategy used for the model context

service_tier.description: The service tier used for processing the request

OutputItem.description: A single output item from the model response

id.description: The unique ID of the output item

role.description: The role of the output item author

status.description: The status of the output item

content.description: The content of the output message (for message type items)

name.description: The name of the function being called (for function_call type items)

call_id.description: The unique ID of the function call

arguments.description: The arguments to the function call in JSON format

summary.description: A summary of reasoning performed by the model (for reasoning type items)

action.description: The computer action to perform (for computer_call type items)

OutputContentPart.description: A content part within an output message

text.description: The text content of the output

refusal.description: The refusal message if the model declines to respond

annotations.description: Annotations on the text, such as citations from file search or web search

Annotation.description: An annotation on output text, providing citations and references

start_index.description: The start index of the annotated text span

end_index.description: The end index of the annotated text span

title.description: The title of the cited resource

file_id.description: The ID of the cited file (for file_citation and file_path types)

quote.description: The relevant quote from the cited file

ReasoningSummary.description: A summary text entry from the model's reasoning process

Usage.description: Token usage statistics for the response

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens used

input_tokens_details.description: Detailed breakdown of input token usage

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated

output_tokens_details.description: Detailed breakdown of output token usage

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens used (input + output)

ResponseError.description: Error information when a response generation fails

summary.description: The level of reasoning summary detail

TextConfig.description: Configuration for the text response format

format.description: The format specification for the response text

name.description: The name of the response format schema

description.description: A description of the response format

schema.description: The JSON schema for structured outputs

strict.description: Whether strict schema adherence is enabled

Tool.description: A tool available for the model to use during response generation

name.description: The name of the function (for function type tools)

description.description: A description of what the function does

parameters.description: The parameters the function accepts as a JSON Schema object

strict.description: Whether strict schema adherence is enabled for function calls

vector_store_ids.description: The IDs of vector stores to search (for file_search type)

max_num_results.description: Maximum number of results from file search

server_label.description: A label for the MCP server (for mcp type)

server_url.description: The URL of the MCP server (for mcp type)

allowed_tools.description: List of allowed tool names from the MCP server

InputItem.description: An input item provided to the model as part of a conversation

role.description: The role of the input item

content.description: The content of the input item

id.description: The unique ID of the input item

call_id.description: The ID of the function call this output corresponds to

output.description: The output of the function call

status.description: The status of the input item

InputContentPart.description: A content part within a multi-part input item

image_url.description: The URL of the image (for input_image type)

detail.description: The detail level for image inputs

file_id.description: The ID of the uploaded file (for input_file type)
